project_type: TypeScript monorepo - 9-app ecosystem (chat, email, social, ads, streaming, photo/video, editor, dating, AI hub)
build_system: npm workspaces monorepo - no package installation possible due to INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode
test_framework: Custom lightweight test runner (no external deps available)
build_command: npx tsc --noEmit (TypeScript type checking only - no external packages available)
verification_instructions: 1. Run TypeScript compiler to check types. 2. Verify file structure is complete. 3. Check that all apps have required files.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - all code is written directly. Node.js v22 is pre-installed.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode - NO npm install, pip install, or any package downloads possible. All code must be self-contained. Use only Node.js v22 built-in APIs. Package.json files define structure but deps cannot be installed. Focus on writing complete source code with inline implementations where needed.
contribution_requirements: Monorepo structure with shared packages. QuantMail is central auth. All apps deeply integrated via shared services.
key_patterns: Each app: apps/<name>/ with src/pages/, src/components/, src/services/, src/types/. Shared: packages/shared-ui/, packages/auth/, packages/ai/, packages/common/. Backend: apps/<name>/api/ with routes, controllers, models, middleware.
directory_structure:
/ - root monorepo
/apps/ - all 9 applications
/apps/quantchat/ - Snapchat-like chat app
/apps/quantmail/ - Gmail+GitHub central auth
/apps/quantsync/ - Twitter/Reddit social
/apps/quantads/ - Ad platform
/apps/quantube/ - Video/Music streaming
/apps/quantneon/ - Instagram-like photos
/apps/quantedits/ - Video/Photo editor
/apps/quantmax/ - TikTok/Omegle/Tinder
/apps/quantai/ - Central AI hub
/packages/ - shared libraries
/packages/auth/ - authentication (QuantMail-based)
/packages/ai/ - AI integration layer
/packages/shared-ui/ - reusable UI components
/packages/common/ - utilities, types, constants
/packages/database/ - DB schemas and models
/packages/realtime/ - WebSocket/realtime infra
/scripts/ - build and dev scripts
